content: Hi, I have a billing question.
Hello! Welcome to Tasklet support. How can I help you today?
I was charged but I cancelled my plan last week. I shouldn't have been billed.
I see, that sounds like a billing issue. Let me help you with that.
Could I get your account email address and the approximate date of the charge?
It's priya@example.com and the charge was on the 14th of this month.
Thank you. And do you happen to have the invoice number or the charge amount?
It was $49. I don't have the invoice number handy.

That's fine. I can see the charge on your account. Since your cancellation was processed before the billing date, you are eligible for a full refund. I'll submit that now and you should see it in 5 to 7 business days.
You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with today?
Perfect. Have a wonderful day and don't hesitate to reach out if anything else comes up!
